testimonials.testimonial1: Flawless service! Punctual driver, luxurious vehicle and perfect driving. An experience worthy of the highest international standards.
testimonials.testimonial2: I used Yahya Car for my trips in Casablanca. Remarkable professionalism, I highly recommend.
testimonials.testimonial3: Airport transfer organized without any difficulty. Warm welcome, absolute comfort. My new reflex in Morocco.

faq.a1: Booking is simple and fast. Choose your service (airport transfer, tour, business transport), select your dates and locations, then confirm your reservation. Our team will contact you to finalize the details of your pick-up.
faq.q2: What types of vehicles do you offer ?
faq.a2: Our premium fleet includes the Skoda Superb, Skoda Octavia and Mercedes Vito. Each vehicle is carefully maintained and equipped for your optimal comfort.
faq.a3: Yes, you can cancel your reservation up to 24 hours before pick-up free of charge. A 50% fee applies for late cancellations.
faq.a4: We cover the main cities of Morocco: Casablanca, Marrakech, Rabat, Tangier, Agadir, Fez and their airports. Additional destinations can be arranged on request.

footer.tagline: Yahya Car — Where quality meets affordability

sections.title: Age limit, drivers and documents
sections.content:
The main driver and any additional driver named on the contract are the only people authorized to drive the vehicle. They must be over 21 years old and hold a valid driving license issued at least one year ago.

To benefit from our chauffeur services, you must present a valid driving license and a passport. Photocopies are not accepted.

sections.title: Booking procedure
sections.content:
Booking a vehicle with Yahya Car in Morocco allows you to benefit from quality car rental and optional services such as pick-up and drop-off at a specified date and location for an agreed period.

You may cancel your booking at any time up to 24 hours before the scheduled pick-up date by informing us by email or WhatsApp.

sections.title: Vehicle pick-up and return
sections.content:
Yahya Car provides pick-up and drop-off at airports, hotels or your residence in all cities where we operate.

It is possible to be picked up in one city and dropped off in another.

sections.title: Vehicle
sections.content: The vehicle is provided in perfect working condition with all equipment and documents required to travel in Morocco. Each vehicle in our fleet is carefully inspected before every departure.

sections.title: Service use
sections.content:
You must use the transport service in accordance with Moroccan laws and regulations. The assigned driver is a qualified professional who respects the highway code and safety rules.

Use of the vehicle outside Morocco is not permitted.

If you wish to extend your service duration, please inform us as soon as possible, at least 24 hours in advance.

sections.title: Unacceptable behavior
sections.content: Yahya Car may refuse to provide you with a service if you show discourteous or unacceptable behavior, such as driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs, or behaving rudely toward a driver or agency representative.

sections.title: Payment methods
sections.content: We accept Visa and MasterCard credit cards. You can also pay by bank transfer or cash.

sections.title: Prepayments and deposits
sections.content: A prepayment may be required to confirm certain reservations. The amount will be communicated to you upon confirmation of your service.

sections.title: Accidents and damage
sections.content:
In the event of an accident or damage to the vehicle, even if no third party is involved, you must immediately notify the police and Yahya Car within 48 hours.

For minor damage, no additional charges will be applied.

sections.title: Insurance
sections.content: All our vehicles are fully insured in accordance with Moroccan regulations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - YAHYA CAR
privacy.intro: This privacy notice for YAHYA CAR ('we', 'us' or 'our') describes how and why we may collect, store, use and/or share your information when you use our services, such as when you visit our website at https://yahyacar.ma or any other company website that links to this privacy notice.

sections.title: Summary of key points
sections.content:
This summary provides the key points of our privacy notice.

What personal information do we process? When you visit, use or navigate our services, we may process personal information depending on how you interact with us and the services, the choices you make, and the products and features you use.

Do we process sensitive personal information? We do not process sensitive personal information.

Do we collect information from third parties? We do not collect information from third parties.

How do we process your information? We process your information to provide, improve and administer our services, communicate with you, maintain security, prevent fraud and comply with the law.

How do we keep your information safe? We have implemented organizational and technical processes and procedures to protect your personal information.

What are your rights? Depending on your geographic location, applicable privacy law may give you certain rights regarding your personal information.

sections.title: 1. What information do we collect?
sections.content:
Personal information you disclose to us: we collect the personal information you voluntarily provide when you express interest in obtaining information about us, our products or services, when you participate in activities on the services, or when you contact us.

The personal information we collect may include:
- names
- phone numbers
- email addresses
- billing addresses

Sensitive information: we do not process sensitive information.

Information collected automatically: some information, such as your IP address and browser/device characteristics, is collected automatically when you visit our services.

sections.title: 2. How do we process your information?
sections.content: We process your information to provide, improve and administer our services, communicate with you, maintain security, prevent fraud and comply with the law. We may also process your information for other purposes with your consent.

sections.title: 3. When and with whom do we share your personal information?
sections.content: We may share information in specific situations described in this section and/or with certain third parties.

sections.title: 4. Do we use cookies and other tracking technologies?
sections.content: We may use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect and store your information. We also allow third parties and service providers to use online tracking technologies on our services for analytics and advertising.

sections.title: 5. How long do we keep your information?
sections.content: We keep your information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this privacy notice, unless the law requires a longer retention period. When we no longer need to process your personal information, we will delete or anonymize it.

sections.title: 6. How do we protect your information?
sections.content: We have implemented appropriate and reasonable technical and organizational security measures designed to protect any personal information we process. However, no electronic transmission over the Internet or information storage technology can be guaranteed to be 100% secure.

sections.title: 7. Do we collect information from minors?
sections.content: We do not knowingly collect or market data from children under 18 years of age.

sections.title: 8. What are your privacy rights?
sections.content: You may review, change or delete your account at any time, depending on your country, province or state of residence. You have the right to withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us.

sections.title: 9. How can you contact us about this notice?
sections.content: If you have questions or comments about this notice, you can contact us by mail at: YAHYA CAR, Bld Fouarat CC N°22, Hay Mohammadi, Casablanca, Morocco — contact@yahyacar.ma
